name: agent-orch
description: CLI-driven Codex workflow for delegating implementation to Claude Code, targeted verification to Antigravity, and read-only monitoring of Agent Orch runs.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate coding to CC, verify with AGY, and monitor runs.
interface.longDescription: A CLI-driven workflow that keeps Codex in charge of project planning and final acceptance while Claude Code implements, Antigravity performs targeted investigation or verification, and a read-only dashboard can inspect Agent Orch progress.
defaultPrompt: Use agent-orch to plan this change, delegate implementation to CC, and verify it.
Use agent-orch to ask AGY to investigate this failure without duplicating implementation.
Use agent-orch to open a read-only dashboard for CC/AGY progress and visible conversation logs.
